$comment: C11/C23 6.4.3 / D-FFI-STDDEF-WCHAR-PE-WIDTH: sizeof(L"\U0001F600") = the byte size of the astral UCN as a wchar_t array, FORMAT-keyed. pe → 6 (a UTF-16 surrogate PAIR = 2 units + NUL, × 2 bytes); elf/mach-o → 8 (ONE u32 unit + NUL, × 4 bytes). Per-target exitCode overrides the manifest default: the ONE source witnesses the surrogate-pair count on pe vs. the single unit elsewhere. The release arm returns the same per target.
